assumptions: The concept targets businesses in Suriname unless a narrower audience is supplied.
Placement dimensions, safe areas, eligibility, and overlays require current platform preview before publication.
Exact copy and the official Zenta logo will be added during final design production, not image prompting.

campaign.audience: owners of small and growing businesses in Suriname who need a clearer online presence

creative_strategy.audience_insight: Prospects often research a business outside opening hours and need a credible place to understand it without waiting for a reply.
creative_strategy.message_angle: A website acts as a calm, always-available front door rather than a promise of instant sales.
creative_strategy.hook: Your business should stay clear after closing time.
creative_strategy.hypothesis: A cinematic after-hours storefront metaphor will make website availability tangible to owners who rely mainly on social messages.

format.crop_guidance: Keep the focal subject and reserved copy area inside the central composition with generous edge clearance.

visual_direction.subject: a closed local storefront whose physical lights are off while a refined digital doorway remains clearly illuminated
visual_direction.action: the digital doorway quietly reveals services, trust cues, and a simple contact path through abstract panels
visual_direction.environment: a believable Paramaribo commercial street just after dusk with no visible private branding
visual_direction.composition: wide negative space upper-left, storefront centered low, luminous digital doorway on the right third
visual_direction.lighting: natural blue-hour ambience with restrained lime doorway light and warm interior remnants
visual_direction.style: cinematic architectural editorial photography with subtle digital realism

copy.overlay_headline: Your business should stay clear after closing time.
copy.caption: Customers may look for you after the doors close. A clear website gives them one place to understand your services and know what to do next.

image_prompt: Create a polished 4:5 base image concept for a Zenta Creative paid ad image. The central subject is a closed local storefront whose physical lights are off while a refined digital doorway remains clearly illuminated. Show the digital doorway quietly reveals services, trust cues, and a simple contact path through abstract panels. Set the scene in a believable Paramaribo commercial street just after dusk with no visible private branding. Composition: wide negative space upper-left, storefront centered low, luminous digital doorway on the right third. Lighting: natural blue-hour ambience with restrained lime doorway light and warm interior remnants. Visual style: cinematic architectural editorial photography with subtle digital realism. Use Zenta's near-black foundation with the controlled palette #030507, #F4F7FB, #B9FF66, #5EE7FF, #9B7CFF; keep lime as the decisive action accent rather than flooding the image with one hue. The image must communicate the strategic angle 'A website acts as a calm, always-available front door rather than a promise of instant sales.' without claiming a result. Reserve clean, high-contrast negative space for the headline 'Your business should stay clear after closing time.', support line 'Websites + Google visibility', and CTA 'Plan your website' to be typeset later by a designer. Do not render any words, letters, prices, logo, wordmark, platform mark, interface copy, or functional QR code inside the base image. Keep the focal subject and copy-safe space comfortably away from edges for placement preview. Avoid e-commerce sales counters, open-24-hours claims, or sci-fi portal effects, fake evidence, visual clutter, and distorted objects or anatomy.
negative_constraints: no generated logo, wordmark, trademark, or third-party platform branding
no fabricated metrics, rankings, leads, revenue, testimonials, or guarantees
no copied Google, Meta, Facebook, Instagram, or WhatsApp interface
no tiny unreadable text, random letters, watermark, or signature
no stereotypes, unapproved likenesses, or identifiable private customer data
e-commerce sales counters, open-24-hours claims, or sci-fi portal effects

accessibility.alt_text: A closed storefront at dusk has one illuminated digital doorway representing an always-available website.
accessibility.contrast_note: Typeset final copy in white or near-black on a solid high-contrast area and verify readability at mobile size.

required_review: Verify the website package and any stated price against the live Zenta website.
Confirm the base image contains no generated branding, fake proof, copied platform trade dress, or private data.
Preview final typography, logo placement, crop, and overlays in every intended placement.

production.typography_instruction: Add the exact overlay copy later using Zenta's bold modern geometric sans-serif system; do not ask an image model to typeset it.
production.logo_instruction: Reserve space for the approved Zenta logo and place the original brand asset only during final design production.
